title: AN ACT TO CREATE THE BARRIOS OF UBA, MABA-HIN, TAG-ANOÃGAN AND MANLICO, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CORTES, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3440 / 51 OG No. 8, 3881 (August, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1329, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT TO CREATE THE BARRIOS OF UBA, MABA-HIN, TAG-ANOÃGAN AND MANLICO, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CORTES, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Uba, Mabahin, Tag-anongan and Manlico, in the Municipality of Cortes, Province of Surigao, are hereby constituted into barrios in the same municipality, to be known as Uba, Mabahin, Tag-anoñgan and Manlico, respectively.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
